summary: Verified Hint modal fix on desktop (1280x720) and mobile (390x740). Modal opens, loads recommended alg from blddb.net, expands full list, remains fully within viewport, is internally scrollable, footer link reachable after scroll, and scrollbar is dark themed. Regression: style dropdown switch to 'Manmade' works and close button closes modal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hint modal cropping bug fully resolved. Desktop: modal top=24, bottom=696 (winH=720), scrollHeight=1620 vs clientHeight=670, scrollTop went to 950 after scrolling to bottom, blddb footer link visible. Mobile: top=12, bottom=728 (winH=740), scrollHeight=778 vs clientHeight=714, scrollTop=64 reaches bottom, footer visible. scrollbar-color computed as 'rgb(63, 63, 70) rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)' matching dark theme #3f3f46 on transparent. Style dropdown switch to Manmade succeeded and close button removed modal from DOM. No issues.
